name: Independent constraint sectors
definition: Independent structural sectors add in exponent
reason: C and |E|/|V| are formally independent (one from indices, other from graph). For independent sectors, addition is the unique unweighted linear composition.

name: Log-factorization
definition: mass = phi^C * phi^(|E|/|V|), so exponent = C + |E|/|V|
reason: Mass factorizes into independent set and graph contributions. Exponent addition is the logarithm of mass factorization. Factorization is justified by sector independence.

name: Action decomposition
definition: S_eff = S_set + S_graph, with m ~ phi^S_eff
reason: Standard action additivity for independent sectors.

name: Occupancy + transport cost
definition: Total closure burden = occupancy C + transport |E|/|V|
reason: Independent simultaneous costs add. Occupancy and transport are independent.

name: Description-length decomposition
definition: Total description = shell specification + graph specification
reason: Formally requires C and |E|/|V| to be actual information measures. They are not. The analogy supports additivity but does not derive it.

name: Closure-operator tensor decomposition
definition: Closure operator = support-selector ⊗ graph-coupler; exponent = sum of sector exponents
reason: Operators on independent spaces commute. Tensor product of independent operators yields additive exponents. This is the operator-level foundation for exponent additivity.
